Built on Integrity, Driven by Results

Arrow Roofing and Siding started with a simple goal: to provide Columbus homeowners with durable, beautiful siding solutions they can rely on. We're a local company, not a franchise, and we take pride in our reputation for quality workmanship and honest service.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our siding contractor services.

How long does vinyl siding last in Columbus' climate?

With proper installation and maintenance, vinyl siding can last for 20-30 years or more in Columbus. Look for insulated vinyl siding to increase energy efficiency.

Can vinyl siding increase my home's value?

Yes, new vinyl siding can significantly improve your home's curb appeal and increase its resale value. Choose a style and color that complements your home's architecture.

Is vinyl siding environmentally friendly?

Vinyl siding is recyclable, and many manufacturers use recycled materials in their products. It also helps improve energy efficiency, reducing your home's carbon footprint.

Reviews From Our Siding Contractor Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Arrow Roofing and Siding did an outstanding job installing new vinyl siding on my home in Clintonville. The crew was professional, efficient, and meticulous. The new siding looks fantastic, and I've already noticed a difference in my energy bills. Highly recommend!"

John S. Vinyl Siding Installation

"I had some storm damage to my fiber cement siding, and Arrow Roofing and Siding repaired it quickly and effectively. The repair is seamless, and you can't even tell there was any damage. Great service!"

Mary K. Siding Repair

"Arrow Roofing and Siding installed James Hardie siding on our Worthington home. The team was knowledgeable and helped us choose the perfect color and style. The installation was flawless, and our home looks amazing! Worth every penny."

David L. Fiber Cement Siding Installation
